title: pimpinella liiana
intro: Pimpinella liiana, also known as the Himalayan Chervil or Chervil, is a perennial plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and is used as a medicinal plant due to its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory disorders, and it may also help to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Pimpinella liiana can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
